IncrementalSkipState.description: State model derived from IncrementalSkip TLA+ spec

SkipOnlyWhenIncremental.description: Verifier for invariant SkipOnlyWhenIncremental from IncrementalSkip spec

SkipOnlyWhenHashMatch.message: SkipOnlyWhenHashMatch violation: \A u \in skipped : records[u].src_hash = current_hashes[u]
SkipOnlyWhenHashMatch.description: Verifier for invariant SkipOnlyWhenHashMatch from IncrementalSkip spec

SkipNeverExtracted.description: Verifier for invariant SkipNeverExtracted from IncrementalSkip spec

UnchangedNeverExtracted.message:
UnchangedNeverExtracted violation: \A u \in UUIDs \ remaining :
        (incremental /\ IsTerminal(u) /\ HashMatches(u)) =>
        u \in skipped
UnchangedNeverExtracted.description: Verifier for invariant UnchangedNeverExtracted from IncrementalSkip spec

conditions:
\A u \in UUIDs \ remaining :
        u \in skipped \/ u \in extracted
ProcessedPartition.message:
ProcessedPartition violation: \A u \in UUIDs \ remaining :
        u \in skipped \/ u \in extracted
ProcessedPartition.description: Verifier for invariant ProcessedPartition from IncrementalSkip spec

BoundedSkipped.description: Verifier for invariant BoundedSkipped from IncrementalSkip spec

BoundedExtracted.description: Verifier for invariant BoundedExtracted from IncrementalSkip spec

assert_SkipOnlyWhenIncremental.message: Assertion failed: SkipOnlyWhenIncremental — skipped # {} => incremental = TRUE
assert_SkipOnlyWhenIncremental.description: Test assertion for SkipOnlyWhenIncremental from IncrementalSkip spec

assert_SkipOnlyWhenHashMatch.message: Assertion failed: SkipOnlyWhenHashMatch — \A u \in skipped : records[u].src_hash = current_hashes[u]
assert_SkipOnlyWhenHashMatch.description: Test assertion for SkipOnlyWhenHashMatch from IncrementalSkip spec

assert_SkipNeverExtracted.description: Test assertion for SkipNeverExtracted from IncrementalSkip spec

assert_UnchangedNeverExtracted.condition:
\A u in UUIDs \ remaining :
        (incremental and IsTerminal(u) and HashMatches(u)) implies
        u in skipped
assert_UnchangedNeverExtracted.message:
Assertion failed: UnchangedNeverExtracted — \A u \in UUIDs \ remaining :
        (incremental /\ IsTerminal(u) /\ HashMatches(u)) =>
        u \in skipped
assert_UnchangedNeverExtracted.description: Test assertion for UnchangedNeverExtracted from IncrementalSkip spec

assert_ProcessedPartition.condition:
\A u in UUIDs \ remaining :
        u in skipped or u in extracted
assert_ProcessedPartition.message:
Assertion failed: ProcessedPartition — \A u \in UUIDs \ remaining :
        u \in skipped \/ u \in extracted
assert_ProcessedPartition.description: Test assertion for ProcessedPartition from IncrementalSkip spec

assert_BoundedSkipped.description: Test assertion for BoundedSkipped from IncrementalSkip spec

assert_BoundedExtracted.description: Test assertion for BoundedExtracted from IncrementalSkip spec
